text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not enough... More... I need to run more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time has passed since I became Admire Vega's trainer.
choice_data_list:
(She's still not digging into the ground enough.
Also...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I add to my already copious notes on her running. These will help me
develop a regimen to prepare her for her next race. But the real
question is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Whether or not she'll actually listen to my advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes minor feedback well, but when it comes to anything that
would involve us working as a team...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm fine being alone. Prefer it, even.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I mean, I'll need a trainer to compete in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might not be the most receptive to a program that requires close
cooperation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm her trainer, and I've already said that her attitude won't stop me
from supporting her. It's at least worth a shot.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going off campus for a run.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't bother waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes off before I get a chance to respond. I'd try to catch up,
but I know firsthand that's not happening.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(This is fine. I can still run. I can go far, somewhere I can be close to
the stars. Alone.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I am... alone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: By the time I finish organizing my notes, night has crept up on me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to be sure I can make my case to her tomorrow. I need to prove
that I can be helpful.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Again? Of all the places...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, you'll catch a cold. If you're going to sleep, do it at home.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Computer's still on, notes strewn about...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Likes stars." "Change training time?" "Somewhere we can see the
stars? Ask Tazuna."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "There has to be more..."

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: "What more can I do for her?"

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why? I... I've said I'm fine alone... time and time again...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I wanted to go see the stars. To run and run as far as my legs would
take me.)
(There was someone waiting back home.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...No, that's not it. I came back because... because of curfew. That's it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: All your hard work... I'm not the one who should be benefiting from it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(No... There's someone else more deserving. Someone who would've
shone brighter, like a brilliant star...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: My one... and only... sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Someone covers me with the blanket I'd left on the sofa. Too
comfortable to open my eyes, I hear footsteps fading away as I
dream.
